response.justification: Exceeds seniority and experience requirements with current Staff-level role and 6+ years confirmed full-stack work. Strong alignment on TypeScript, Node.js, databases, cloud platforms, containerization, and explicit AI agent infrastructure experience. Notable gaps in React (primary frontend stack), specific testing frameworks (Vitest/Jest), and GCP/Azure are learnable for a senior engineer.
strengths: Exceeds seniority requirement at Staff level with 6+ years confirmed full-stack experience across multiple domains
Direct match on TypeScript, Node.js, databases, AWS/Docker/Kubernetes, and AI agent development
Demonstrated ownership, TDD/testing mindset, and ability to mentor (workshops/talks)
concerns: React not mentioned; resume shows Ember.js as primary frontend framework despite React being primary stack
Specific testing frameworks (Vitest, Jest, Playwright) not explicitly referenced
Only AWS cloud platform shown; no evidence of GCP or Azure experience

key_factors.factor: React and specific testing framework gaps
